tracks.meaning: the flat part of a bone, especially the shoulder blade or hip bone
a sharp flat cutting implement with a handle, such as a knife or sword
the flat green leaf of grass or similar plants
a flat rotating metal part in a turbine, propeller, or fan that generates or redirects motion
the flat part of an ice skate or roller skate that contacts the ice or ground
a term for a person who works as a hired killer or an aggressive tough person
the flat cutting surface of a tool such as a chisel, saw, or plane
to skate on ice or wheels, using blades as skates
